summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kirti Killedar portfolio website. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: MongoDB _id ObjectId serialization errors were causing 500 errors on public events endpoint and admin endpoints. After fix, all 28 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend correctly displays admin-managed content, page titles work correctly.

fixed.issue: 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId not being serializable

issues: Projects without images show empty placeholder - this is expected behavior but could have a default image

critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB ObjectId must always be excluded from API responses using {"_id": 0} projection - this was the root cause of the 'admin changes not visible' bug
Admin form components in React use controlled inputs - filling forms via JavaScript requires triggering proper React events, not just setting .value

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, admin login works, CRUD operations work, changes reflect on frontend)

seed_data_creation: Test data was created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major functionality verified working: admin authentication, home/about content management, projects CRUD, gallery CRUD, events CRUD, contact info management. Page titles dynamically update (e.g., 'Work | Kirti Killedar'). Database was empty at start of testing. Test data created during testing was cleaned up.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: User reported 'admin changes are not still visible, even after I changed in the admin portal in the live site'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: MongoDB's ObjectId (_id field) was being returned in API responses without exclusion. When FastAPI tried to serialize ObjectId to JSON, it threw 'ObjectId object is not iterable' error causing 500 Internal Server Error on several endpoints including /api/events, /api/admin/projects, /api/admin/events, /api/admin/gallery.
rca_of_the_issue.evidence: Backend error logs showed: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable"), TypeError('vars() argument must have __dict__ attribute')]
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added {"_id": 0} projection to all MongoDB find() and find_one() queries to exclude the _id field from results
rca_of_the_issue.verification: After fix, all 28 API tests pass. Frontend correctly displays projects, events, and content created via admin panel.
